name: SCAR-20 | 暴风呼啸
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a stormy color scheme. It will be waiting for you at the monorail
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器的部分零件以暴风雨的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 它在轨道上等着你
